name: The Wurmspat
inspire:
If 3 or more enemy fighters are slain or damaged, Inspire each friendly fighter.

After an enemy fighter with any bile tokens is slain by a friendly fighter, Inspire that fighter.

reactions.name: Disgustingly Resilient
reactions.trigger: Immediately before damage is inflicted on a friendly fighter by an Attack without Cleave ({icon:cleave}), if the Save roll contained any {icon:shield}
reactions.flavorText: Nurgle's chosen are all but inured to pain.
reactions.rulesText: Immediately before damage is inflicted on a friendly fighter by an Attack without Cleave ({icon:cleave}), if the Save roll contained any {icon:shield}, reduce the damage of that Attack by 1.

abilities.name: Grandfather's Gifts
abilities.flavorText: One scratch, and the plagues do their great work…
abilities.rulesText:
Bile Blade {icon:fury}: If the Attack was successful, give the target a bile token after the Attack has been resolved.

Enemy fighters have -1 Move while they have any bile tokens. Remove all bile tokens from enemy fighters at the end of the battle round.

abilities.name: Steady Advance
abilities.flavorText: No need to hurry - there will be boons for all, in due time.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in your Power step. Pick up to 2 friendly fighters. Push each of those fighters 1 hex. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Nauseous Revulsion
abilities.flavorText: Not everyone appreciates the nature of Fecula's gifts. Ingrates…
abilities.rulesText: Use this in your Power step. Enemy fighters' melee weapons have -1 Attack dice in the next turn. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Blades of Putrefaction
abilities.flavorText: Vile slime and liquid agues drip from the edges of the Wurmspat's blades.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in a Power step. Friendly fighters' melee weapons have Grievous ({icon:grievous}) in addition to any other Weapon abilities in the next turn. You can only use this ability once per game.
